title: Shawarma-Style Beef Kebabs with Ethiopian Spice
description: A flavorful and spicy take on traditional shawarma, with the added warmth of Ethiopian berbere spice. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together berbere spice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Add sliced beef and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread marinated beef onto skewers.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until beef is cooked to desired level of doneness.
While beef is cooking, mix together almond butter, roasted garlic, and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once beef is cooked, brush with almond butter sauce and serve with sliced red onion.
